overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic city. The clip begins with a dramatic upward view of a towering glass skyscraper before descending to street level, revealing neon-lit boulevards, holographic advertisements, and light vehicle traffic on wet reflective asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: towering skyscraper canyon with glass facades

events.description: camera stops looking upward at the skyscraper and begins moving forward at street level

agents.ego_description: looking up at the illuminated skyscraper facade before panning down to street level and beginning to walk forward

entered.detail: tall futuristic building with illuminated windows rising vertically into the night sky
dark building exterior with exposed structural beams and scattered lit windows
tall street light casting warm orange glow through the falling rain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a dramatic upward view of a towering glass skyscraper at night, rain falling through the illuminated facade. The camera slowly pans down from the heights of the building to street level, revealing the wet asphalt and warm street lamps, before beginning to move forward into the urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with holographic advertisements

events.description: red delivery van and black car pass by on the wet multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath towering buildings, passing under warm street lights and alongside the road

notable_agents.action: red delivery van driving along the wet road surface with illuminated taillights

entered.detail: large floating holographic advertisement displaying a pink-haired anime-style character with Japanese text
bright red commercial vehicle with boxy shape and glowing red taillights
series of tall street lamps illuminating the rainy street with warm light

segments.scene_description: Moving along the rain-soaked street, the scene reveals a massive holographic billboard of a pink-haired character dominating the right side. The camera passes beneath building overhangs and street lamps as vehicles including a red van drive past on the wet asphalt, their lights reflecting off the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown avenue with overhead highway structures and vertical signage

events.description: black sports car with glowing red underglow trim passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the rain-soaked sidewalk past various commercial storefronts and illuminated street lights

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving past with distinctive red neon underglow lighting

entered.detail: tall illuminated advertising displays with various colors and Japanese text mounted on buildings
elevated roadway or monorail track with support pillars spanning above the street
ground-level shops with illuminated windows and glowing signage

segments.scene_description: The walk continues beneath an elevated highway structure as various vehicles including a black sports car with red underglow pass by. Vertical neon billboards line the left side of the street while commercial storefronts occupy the right, all illuminated against the rainy night atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with bright vertical signage and pedestrian activity

events.description: pedestrian appears on the left sidewalk, first human figure encountered in the scene

agents.ego_description: walking past bright storefronts and neon signs, approaching a pedestrian standing by the roadside

notable_agents.action: person standing on the sidewalk near a street lamp, facing toward the street

entered.detail: bright red and white illuminated sign with large text mounted on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The final stretch of the walk features prominent vertical neon signage on the right and various commercial displays. A pedestrian appears standing on the left sidewalk near a street lamp, the first person visible in the scene, as the camera continues moving forward through the rain-slicked streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from the dizzying heights of a futuristic skyscraper down into the neon-drenched depths of a rain-soaked city street. It begins with a dramatic upward view of a towering glass facade before panning down to the wet asphalt and warm street lamps of the urban canyon. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens up to reveal a massive holographic billboard of a pink-haired character and vehicles, including a red van, gliding across the reflective pavement. The perspective then shifts beneath the heavy shadow of an elevated highway, passing black sports cars with red underglow and vertical neon billboards that line the rainy thoroughfare. Finally, the walk continues past glowing commercial storefronts and vertical signage before passing a lone pedestrian standing under a street lamp on the rain-slicked sidewalk.
